# Overcoming Spiritual Battles
## Scripture
"Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the schemes of the devil." – Ephesians 6:11
## Reflection
As men of faith, we often find ourselves engaged in spiritual battles. Satan is relentless in his pursuit to derail our walk with Christ. To overcome these battles, we must put on the whole armor of God – a spiritual shield that protects us from his attacks. This armor consists of faith, salvation, righteousness, the gospel of peace, the word of God, prayer, and the Spirit of God. When we don the full armor of God, we become a formidable opponent of the enemy. We must remember that spiritual battles are not won by human strength alone, but by the power of God that resides within us. As we suit up with the armor of God, we must also remember to be vigilant and pray without ceasing, for the battle is ongoing.

## Daily Challenge
"Pray 5 minutes of intense, spirit-filled prayer while putting on your armor of God."
